raw_consumer_statement:
This charge corresponds to an airline ticket purchase with XXXX. However, when I arrived at the XXXX airport on XX/XX/year> to check in for my flight, I was informed that my payment had not been processed and that there was no valid ticket issued under my name. I showed that the payment was pending on my account, but XXXX was unable to locate any reservation or transaction. 

As the boarding time was approaching, I had no choice but to purchase another ticket for the same flight, which cost {$720.00}. A few days later, the original {$680.00} charge also posted to my account, resulting in a double payment for one flight. 

I contacted XXXX and was informed, in writing, that they could not locate any transaction for the {$680.00} charge. I have attached emails confirming this. 

In addition to requesting the reversal of the {$680.00} charge, I would like to express my dissatisfaction with how American Express has handled this situation. I find it extremely frustrating and disappointing to be held financially responsible for a service that I did not receive, despite providing clear documentation and having made every effort to resolve this issue properly.
